formInstance.inputDocument: Bradley Gardner is submitting this rental application to express his interest in securing a rental property. He can be reached at jwhitehead@yahoo.com or via phone at 001-867-681-7213. Born on 1994/04/04, Bradley currently resides at 9404 Patricia Islands Apt. 425, Thomasbury, Tennessee, 76601. Professionally, Bradley is employed as an Osteopath at Hughes LLC, where he earns a monthly income of $6,139 and has been working for 1 year. He has set a maximum monthly rent budget of $2,321. Bradley is seeking to move in on 2025/01/01, with a preference for a lease term of 6 months. The preferred area is "Quiet neighborhood." Bradley does not have any pets: "No pets." Additional Comments: "Looking for family-friendly options."
